name: Orange-Melon Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cubed cantaloupe until smooth, removing any seeds or debris.
2. Mix in the sugar, honey, and lemon juice until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into an ice-cream maker and churn according to the manufacturer's instructions (about 20 to 30 minutes).
4. Alternatively, pour the mixture into a shallow metal pan and freeze until firm.
5. Once frozen, transfer the sorbet to a food processor and blend until smooth and fluffy.
6. Serve immediately or return to the freezer for up to 2 to 3 days before serving.
7. To prevent the top from drying out during storage, cover with waxed paper or saran wrap.
